TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Kevin_Alejandro, title = Kevin_Alejandro, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kevin_Alejandro} }

S.FORM: Kevin Alejandro kawas tay 1976, ryax sa tay 7 nqu tay 4, Kevin Alejandro, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
Kevin Alejandro kawas tay 1976, ryax sa tay 7 nqu tay 4, Kevin Alejandro, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: ke*in alejan*ro kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, ke*in alejan*ro, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
